name: Crunchy Breakfast Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in a large bowl to make a well in the center of the mixture.
2. Combine the egg and remaining ingredients; add them to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
3. Spoon the batter into a greased and floured 8-1/2" x 4-1/2" loaf pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
Yield: 1 loaf
